classification.description: Letter of amendment to a debenture created on 2ND february 1995 between the company and the lender

particulars.description: See debenture dated 2ND february 1995 for details of property charged as they have not been changed by this letter of amendment.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee pursuant to an agreement dated 2ND february 1995 in relation to the provision of a guarantee facility

particulars.description: Fixed and floating charges over the undertaking and all property and assets present and future including goodwill bookdebts uncalled capital buildings fixtures fixed plant and machinery. See the mortgage charge document for full details.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee under the terms of the debenture
